hotels.description_en:
Set in Coonoor, 9 km from Sim's Park, and Dolphin's Nose reachable within 17 km, StayVista at Aashirwaad Villa offers a shared lounge, a garden and free WiFi.
Each unit is fitted with a fully equipped kitchen with a fridge, a fireplace, a seating area, a flat-screen TV and a private bathroom with shower and a hairdryer.
Guests at the villa can enjoy an Asian breakfast.
The nearest airport is Coimbatore International Airport, 82 km from StayVista at Aashirwaad Villa.
Distance in property description is calculated using Â© OpenStreetMap
